name: Hall Empty
description: Concert hall falling silent after last audience member leaves

prompts.label: concert hall falling silent after last audience member departs
prompts.text: concert hall falling silent after last audience member departs, cathedral reverb at midnight, bowed singing bowl overtone, warm fog dissolving slowly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, with natural decay

prompts.label: vast performance space settling into empty reverberant quiet
prompts.text: vast performance space settling into empty reverberant quiet, tape-saturated warmth, granular piano cloud, candlelight flickering softly, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, smooth fade out

prompts.label: theater seats folding up as hall returns to stillness
prompts.text: theater seats folding up as hall returns to stillness, Brian Eno infinite space, reversed cymbal swell, underwater weightlessness, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, lush, sustained resonance

prompts.label: stage lights clicking off leaving only exit sign glow
prompts.text: stage lights clicking off leaving only exit sign glow, abandoned hall echo, harmonium drone with tape wobble, drifting between sleep and waking, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, wide, with natural decay

prompts.label: room tone of empty hall breathing with HVAC whisper
